fields.label: Learner
fields.description: Lookup to the learner Contact this badge was awarded to. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Select the learner this badge was awarded to.

fields.label: Badge Key
fields.description: Machine-readable badge identifier. Values: first_deploy / sprint_complete / qa_champion / client_win / code_reviewer / career_ready. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The badge identifier key. Must match the approved badge key list exactly.

fields.label: Badge Name
fields.description: Human-readable display name for this badge. Required. e.g. First Deployment. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The display name shown to learners for this badge.

fields.label: Awarded By
fields.description: Whether badge was awarded by system (Penny automatically) or coach (manually). Values: system / coach. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Who awarded this badge — Penny automatically (system) or a coach manually.

fields.label: Note
fields.description: Optional note from a coach when manually awarding this badge. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Add a personal note when manually awarding this badge to a learner. Optional.

fields.label: Awarded At
fields.description: Date and time this badge was awarded. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The date and time this badge was awarded. Set automatically.
